# openai_group_user (Data Source)

Look up a user's membership in an organization group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_group_user" "example" {
  group_id = "group_123"
  user_id  = "user_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) group id
- `user_id` (String) user id

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) email
- `id` (String) id
- `is_service_account` (Boolean) is service account
- `name` (String) name
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
- `user_type` (String) user type
